commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `errorBody` to Anthropic thinking-recovery error traversal and adds a focused regression case for a ProviderHttpError-like error body.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +12. Total +13 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current `shouldRecoverAnthropicThinkingError` does not traverse `errorBody`, while `ProviderHttpError` stores bounded provider response body text there.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer selection among overlapping candidate PRs, not a concrete repair ClawSweeper can safely make on this branch.

target.title: fix: clear timeout timer in Tailscale binary probe Promise.race
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where `findTailscaleBinary` would leave a dangling timer after each binary check because `Promise.race` with a `setTimeout` was never cleared when `runExec` completed first.

## Why This Change Was Made

Wrap the `Promise.race` in `try/finally` that captures and clears the timer handle.

## User Impact

No user-visible change. Prevents a minor resource leak during Tailscale binary discovery.

## Evidence

```
Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  30 passed (30)
Duration  1.83s
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 12.30s
```

Same cleanup pattern already used in `src/node-host/with-timeout.ts:37-45`.
